creator: jim@reptiles.org
text:
previously, i ran 2.2.5-RELEASE, with mgetty and stock pppd.
dialing from Livingston Portmaster to FreeBSD
previous configuration worked fine.
currently using user-ppp, which works fine.
configuration with 3.3-RELEASE, using same config files results in:

Sep 23 13:31:08 home-gw pppd[3762]: pppd 2.3.5 started by root, uid 0
Sep 23 13:31:08 home-gw pppd[3762]: Connect: ppp0 <--> /dev/cuaa0
Sep 23 13:31:14 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:14 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:14 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0xc0
Sep 23 13:31:17 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:18 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0xc0
Sep 23 13:31:18 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:21 home-gw last message repeated 2 times
Sep 23 13:31:21 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0xc0
Sep 23 13:31:24 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:24 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0xc0
Sep 23 13:31:24 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:27 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:27 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0xc0
Sep 23 13:31:27 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:30 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0xc0
Sep 23 13:31:30 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:33 home-gw last message repeated 2 times
Sep 23 13:31:33 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0xc0
Sep 23 13:31:33 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:36 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0xc0
Sep 23 13:31:39 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0xc0
Sep 23 13:31:39 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:42 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0xc0
Sep 23 13:31:42 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:42 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0x80
Sep 23 13:31:45 home-gw pppd[3762]: IPCP: timeout sending Config-Requests
Sep 23 13:31:45 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: missing UI (0x3), got 0xc0
Sep 23 13:31:45 home-gw /kernel: ppp0: garbage received: 0x4e (need 0xFF)
Sep 23 13:31:51 home-gw pppd[3762]: Connection terminated, connected for 1 minu
tes

another time there was a few:
Sep 23 11:47:11 home-gw pppd[1210]: IPCP: timeout sending Config-Requests
Sep 23 11:47:11 home-gw pppd[1210]: sent [LCP TermReq id=0x3 "No network protoc
ols running"]
